name: Pork Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the ribs in a large Dutch oven or kettle and cover them with enough boiling water.
2. Add 1 teaspoon of salt, 1 lemon (thinly sliced), and 1 onion (thinly sliced).
3. Cook for 45-60 minutes.
4. Drain the ribs thoroughly, discarding the lemon and onion slices.
5. Brush the drained ribs well with barbecue sauce.
6. Place the ribs over slow coals.
7. Turn the ribs every 10 minutes and brush frequently with more sauce.
8. Continue cooking until the ribs are done and well coated with sauce. Serve with extra sauce.
